---
name: Context7 Documentation Policy
description: Mandatory Context7 consultation for governance repositories
applyTo: "**"
---

# Context7 policy (mandatory)

- Use Context7 before implementation, refactor, and review work.
- Prefer current official guidance that is compatible with the repository's docs/governance scope.
- If Context7 is unavailable, state the fallback used and keep the decision evidence-based.

## Mandatory final code review, cross-validation, and factual integrity

- Finish only after final code review plus evidence-based cross-validation.
- Validate correctness, readability, compatibility, and governance-surface consistency before marking work complete.
